message.content:
@startuml
actor "did:...:GS1" as GS1
actor "did:...:Manufacturer" as Manufacturer

box "Ausstellungsprozess der GCP" #white
  GS1 -> GS1
  Manufacturer -> GS1 : GCP Anfrage
  GS1 -> Manufacturer : Berechtigung Prüfen
  GS1 -> Manufacturer : ISSUE
  note over GS1 #lightyellow
    **GCP Credential**
    gcp: 4047111
  end note
  Manufacturer -> Manufacturer : ISSUE
  note over GS1 #lightyellow
    **Party GLN Credential**
    urn:epc:id:pgln:4047111.00000
  end note
end box

box "Ausstellungsprozess zertifizierter Stammdaten" #white
  Manufacturer -> GS1 : PRESENT GCP
  Manufacturer -> GS1 : Anfrage + Nachweis der Stammdaten
  note over GS1 #white
    Prüfung der Stammdaten basierend auf
    Dokumenten oder eigener Recherche
  end note
  GS1 -> GS1
  GS1 -> Manufacturer : ISSUE
  note over GS1 #lightyellow
    **Stammdaten Credential (e.g.)**
    name: European EPC Competence Center,
    legal_form: GmbH,
    trade_register_number: Köln HBR 61026,
    . . .
  end note
end box

actor "did:...:GS1" as GS1b
actor "did:...:Manufacturer" as Manufacturerb

@enduml
